ConnectionStrings.//: Local PostgreSQL from the shared thiru-apps-db repo. Start with: docker compose up -d (in ../thiru-apps-db)

Jwt.//: Dev-only signing key so the app runs out of the box. Override locally with: dotnet user-secrets set "Jwt:SigningKey" "<your-random-32+char-key>". Use an env var in production.

MarketData.//: Leave ApiKey empty to run on deterministic mock data. Recommended for full live data (charts + signals): get a free Twelve Data key at https://twelvedata.com and run: dotnet user-secrets set "MarketData:ApiKey" "<your-twelve-data-key>". To use Finnhub instead (live quotes only), also set Provider to "Finnhub".
